mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer (customer_no, name, id_type, id_number, gender, phone, email, address, customer_level, birth_date, occupation, branch_id, status, open_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{customerNo}, #{name}, #{idType}, #{idNumber}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{customerLevel}, #{birthDate}, #{occupation}, #{branchId}, #{status}, #{openDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(customer_no, 2) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM customer
